summary: Iteration 7 testing completed - THUMBNAIL feature fully verified + regression on all features. All 29 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend thumbnail display working correctly in sidebar and gallery.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/worlds/{id}/thumbnail - generates valid base64 PNG thumbnail
Backend: POST /api/worlds/{id}/thumbnail - works for empty world (no zones)
Backend: POST /api/worlds/{id}/thumbnail - returns 404 for nonexistent world
Backend: GET /api/worlds/{id}/thumbnail - auto-generates if not cached
Backend: GET /api/worlds/{id}/thumbnail - returns cached version after POST
Backend: GET /api/worlds/{id}/thumbnail - returns 404 for nonexistent world
Backend: POST /api/gallery/publish - auto-generates thumbnail in gallery entry
Backend: GET /api/gallery - returns entries with thumbnail field
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - login with valid credentials
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - rejects invalid credentials (401)
Backend: GET /api/auth/me - returns current user when authenticated
Backend: GET /api/auth/me - returns 401 when unauthenticated
Backend: POST /api/worlds - creates new world
Backend: GET /api/worlds - lists worlds
Backend: GET /api/worlds/{id} - returns world details
Backend: PUT /api/worlds/{id} - updates world
Backend: DELETE /api/worlds/{id} - deletes world
Backend: GET /api/gallery - returns gallery entries
Backend: GET /api/gallery?sort_by=* - all sort options work (recent, popular, downloads, likes, rating)
Backend: GET /api/gallery?query=* - search works
Backend: POST /api/gallery/{id}/like - increments likes
Backend: POST /api/gallery/{id}/fork - creates forked world
Backend: GET /api/worlds/{id}/collaborators - returns collaborators list
Backend: POST /api/worlds/{id}/collaborators - adds collaborator
Backend: GET /api/users/search - returns matching users
Backend: GET /api/activity-feed - requires auth (401)
Backend: GET /api/activity-feed - returns activities when authenticated
Backend: GET /api/notifications - requires auth (401)
Backend: GET /api/notifications - returns notifications when authenticated
Frontend: Sidebar displays 11 thumbnail images
Frontend: Thumbnails are valid base64 PNG data URLs
Frontend: World loads with tools visible (Select, Zone, Prefab, Pan)
Frontend: Save World button works and regenerates thumbnail
Frontend: Export buttons visible (JSON, Hytale, Prefab, JAR)
Frontend: Publish to Gallery button opens dialog
Frontend: Gallery entries with thumbnails display correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Thumbnail generation using Pillow works correctly - generates 128x128 PNG thumbnails
Thumbnail is stored as base64 data URL (data:image/png;base64,...)
GET /api/worlds/{id}/thumbnail auto-generates if not cached - good UX
Gallery publish auto-generates thumbnail and stores on both world and gallery entry
Frontend lazy-loads thumbnails via fetchThumbnail() in AppContext
Sidebar correctly displays thumbnails for worlds with zones
Some older gallery entries don't have thumbnails (pre-feature) - expected behavior
seed_data_creation: Test worlds created during testing with zones and prefabs for thumbnail generation. Cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 testing completed successfully. THUMBNAIL feature fully verified: (1) POST /api/worlds/{id}/thumbnail generates base64 PNG from world zones/prefabs using Pillow, (2) GET /api/worlds/{id}/thumbnail returns cached or auto-generates, (3) Gallery publish auto-generates thumbnail, (4) Frontend sidebar displays thumbnails via lazy-loading fetchThumbnail(), (5) Gallery cards show thumbnails. All regression tests passed for auth, CRUD, gallery, collaborators, and social features. Note: Some older gallery entries don't have thumbnails (published before feature was added).

retrieval.behavior: Returns cached thumbnail or auto-generates if missing

gallery_integration.browse: GET /api/gallery returns entries with thumbnail field

frontend.sidebar: Lazy-loads thumbnails via fetchThumbnail() in AppContext

features_tested.thumbnail_display: Frontend sidebar and gallery show thumbnails
features_tested.world_crud_regression: Create, read, update, delete worlds working
features_tested.gallery_regression: Browse, search, sort, like, fork all working
features_tested.social_regression: User search, activity feed, notifications working
